workLog.detail: Ran /spec on issue #1951. Step 0 PASS. PRD produced via requirements-interview (12 ACs, EARS syntax). Tier 2 classification. Step 9 APPROVED after Q4 wedge revision and two critic passes. REQ-008, DESIGN-008, TASK-008, INTERVIEW-1951 artifacts written.

Gate 5 DX review found 2 HIGH + 3 MED findings: DESIGN hours table boundary contradicted REQ strict-less-than rule; TASK line 225 worked example self-contradicted; AC-09 deferral text differed across files; sequence diagram missing halt arrow; topic normalization incomplete for multi-word entities. Inserted Step 0.5 scaffold into .claude/commands/spec.md between Step 0 closing rule (line 140) and Step 1 numbered list (now line 267). Covers AC-01 through AC-08: heading order, ProvisionalTier mapping tables, topic extraction with 4-step normalization, 3-skill invocation sequence, depth-table for knowledge-graph, degradation rules, entity adjudication with auto-mode and human-mode thresholds, PriorArtBlock 3-subsection schema. Includes guard string <!-- step0.5:incomplete-without-2b --> for AC-12 false-positive prevention until 2B lands.

Added halt criteria section (H6-H11), step0_5-halt block format (5 fields, info-string, parser contract), supplemental Phase 5 hook with phases_needed formula, STEP-0.5-METRICS.md tally directive with examples and archival policy. Removed <!-- step0.5:incomplete-without-2b --> guard string. M2 complete; spec.md grew from 199 to ~340 lines.

Appended Check 9d (Prior Art / Constraints elicitation) to Step 9 pre-mortem list. 9d FAIL conditions: (a) section absent; (b) all 3 subsections empty without coverage note; (c) guard-string still present (Step 0.5 partial). Updated Step 9 narrative to reference 9a/9b/9c/9d. 9a/9b/9c bodies untouched per plan.

Mirrored Step 0.5 + 9d into Copilot CLI SKILL.md to preserve existing byte-identity tests; this resolves deferred-item early (originally out-of-scope per REQ-008). All 95 tests in tests/commands/ pass.

Added parse_halt_block and parse_tally_line to step0_5_parser.py. Added 12 D-check promotion tests covering D2 ProvisionalTier from range (4-6 hours, 2 entities = Tier 2), D8 halt block parser with field/trigger validation, D10/D11 metrics tally line parser with state/trigger consistency. 6 LLM-required dynamic checks (D1, D6, D7, D9, D12, D13, D14) flagged for ADR-057 eval harness follow-on. tests/commands/: 107 pass. M1-M5 all complete.

REQ-008 implementation complete. 9 commits on feat/req-008-step-0-5-memory-first-gate. Spec.md grew from 199 to 339 lines; 12 ACs delivered; 107 tests pass; Copilot CLI mirror landed; plan tracked at .agents/plans/active/req-008-step-0-5-memory-first-gate.md. Ready for /review.

PR 1980 surfaced 11 bot-review threads + 4 unique CI failures. Fixed: workflow regex bug filtering session logs (excluded STEP-0-METRICS.md tally); 9d FAIL clause de-tautologized (token referenced without literal HTML comment); .qualityrc.json encapsulation warn:3 inverted to warn:1; _extract_first_hours_estimate docstring corrected (regex picks last number in range, not first); _hours_to_tier docstring corrected (8h is Tier 3 per mapping); REQ-008 + DESIGN-008 security sections corrected (topic input is author-controlled not trusted; mandate argv-vector subprocess for CWE-78); has_guard_string used in test, paired with new test asserting 2B post-state. 132 tests pass.

PR 1980 had 27 unresolved threads after second wave of bot reviews (gemini-code-assist, coderabbitai). Substantive fixes applied: episode event types test->milestone (CodeRabbit policy); episode metrics recomputed; INTERVIEW frontmatter expanded with required fields (type/id/priority/created/updated/related); REQ-008 category developer-experience->functional; TASK-008 complexity S->L (matches 9.5-14.5h range); marketplace.json description hardcoded counts removed; DESIGN-008 line 277 stale Copilot CLI twin status corrected to reflect M4 mirror; DESIGN-008 frontmatter related TASK-008 added; AC-10 contradictory text reconciled with formula (formula is canonical); halt-block parser strictness increased (exactly-5-lines, no duplicate keys, no free-form lines); 3 new tests added for parser strictness. 135 tests pass.
